title: Death SFX & Particles!
description: This datapack adds Customizable Sound Effects & Particle Effects when you die! 1.21-1.21.10
body:
# **DEATH SFX AND PARTICLES**
**Adds customizable Death Sound Effects & Particles all in Vanilla minecraft 1.21!
No Resourcepacks!, Just the Datapack!**

Hope this finds you peace, because it did for me! I've been searching for a Death Sound Datapack but theres literally none that work or exists for 1.21.10. So I just decided to make one myself!

You can customize the sounds and particles within the .zip--> _data/death_effects/function/**tick.mcfunction**_ (edit with text editor)

When it loads in-game, it'll also show you in chat where the directory is of the tick.mcfunction(config) file

This is my second ever datapack! thank you for trying for it out! Hope you enjoy!

Video: **1st: Preview, 2nd: How I made it, 3rd: Customization, 4th: Preview**

## **PREVIEW // FOR CUSTOMIZATION TUTORIAL, SKIP TO 1:34**
